all.en: The whole office was decorated with twinkling lights and shiny silver ornaments.
all.zh: 整個辦公室都掛滿閃爍的燈飾和亮晶晶的銀色飾品。

all.en: Everyone showed up in festive sweaters, some uglier than others on purpose.
all.zh: 大家都穿著節慶毛衣前來，有些人還故意穿得特別醜。

all.en: The buffet table was loaded with roast chicken, dumplings, and homemade cookies.
all.zh: 自助餐桌上擺滿了烤雞、餃子和自製餅乾。

all.en: Our boss gave a short speech to thank everyone for a hardworking year.
all.zh: 老闆發表了一段簡短的演說，感謝大家辛苦工作了一年。

all.en: He then announced surprise bonuses, which made the room erupt in cheers.
all.zh: 他接著宣布意外的年終獎金，全場頓時歡呼起來。

all.en: We played a Secret Santa game, and I received a quirky coffee mug.
all.zh: 我們玩了交換禮物遊戲，我收到了一個造型古怪的咖啡杯。

all.en: The accountant, usually quiet, surprised us by singing karaoke very loudly.
all.zh: 平常很安靜的會計，竟然出乎意料地大聲唱起卡拉OK。

all.en: Some coworkers started dancing awkwardly to old pop hits.
all.zh: 幾位同事跟著老流行金曲笨拙地跳起舞來。

all.en: I chatted with people from departments I had never spoken to before.
all.zh: 我和一些從未交談過的部門同事聊起天來。

all.en: The intern won the costume contest with a hilarious reindeer outfit.
all.zh: 實習生憑藉一身爆笑的馴鹿裝贏得了服裝大賽。

all.en: As the night ended, I realized we were more than coworkers; we were a small family.
all.zh: 夜晚結束時，我體會到我們不僅是同事，更像是一個小家庭。

all.en: The following Monday, the office still smelled faintly of chocolate cookies and pine.
all.zh: 接下來的星期一，辦公室裡仍隱約飄著巧克力餅乾與松木的香氣。

all.en: Photos from the party were posted on the company chat, and the laughter started all over.
all.zh: 派對的照片被貼上公司聊天群組，歡笑聲又從頭響了一次。

all.en: The intern's reindeer outfit became a popular meme that lasted for the rest of the year.
all.zh: 實習生的馴鹿裝成了一張熱門迷因，整個年度都還在被轉發。

all.en: My quirky coffee mug found a permanent home on the corner of my crowded desk.
all.zh: 我那只造型古怪的咖啡杯，從此固定擺在我擁擠的桌角上。

all.en: The accountant kept singing softly at her cubicle whenever the morning felt too quiet.
all.zh: 每當早晨太過安靜時，會計就會在自己的隔間裡輕聲哼唱。

all.en: Several of us started a weekly lunch group with people from the other departments.
all.zh: 幾位同事還和其他部門的人組成了每週一次的午餐聚會。

all.en: Our boss thanked us again in the next all-hands meeting and shared the new year's goals.
all.zh: 老闆在下一次全體會議上再次感謝我們，並分享了新一年的目標。

all.en: He reminded us that a strong team culture had helped us survive a difficult year.
all.zh: 他提醒大家，是堅實的團隊文化讓我們撐過了艱難的一年。

all.en: On New Year's Eve, many of us stayed late to watch the fireworks from the rooftop.
all.zh: 除夕夜，我們許多人留下來，從頂樓觀賞煙火。

all.en: Standing under the lights, I realized that work felt different when colleagues felt like home.
all.zh: 站在燈光下，我體會到當同事像家人一樣時，工作的感受也截然不同。

all.en: In January, the company announced a new tradition based on the success of the party.
all.zh: 一月時，公司根據這次派對的成功宣布了一項新的傳統。

all.en: Every quarter, a different department would host a small themed gathering for everyone.
all.zh: 每一季，由不同部門主辦一場小型主題聚會，邀請全公司同仁參與。

all.en: The marketing team kicked off spring with a cherry blossom afternoon tea party.
all.zh: 行銷團隊以一場櫻花主題下午茶派對為春天揭開序幕。

all.en: In summer, the engineering team organized a barbecue at a riverside park.
all.zh: 夏天時，工程團隊在河邊公園舉辦了烤肉活動。

all.en: The accountant became the unofficial karaoke host at every single gathering.
all.zh: 那位會計成了每一場聚會的非官方卡拉OK主持人。

all.en: The intern, now a full-time employee, kept his reindeer outfit for next December.
all.zh: 那位實習生如今已成為正職員工，把馴鹿裝留著，準備明年十二月再穿。

all.en: New hires were welcomed at every gathering with a small introduction game.
all.zh: 每場聚會上都會以一個小自我介紹遊戲歡迎新進同事。

all.en: By the end of the year, almost everyone knew at least one person from every team.
all.zh: 到了年底，幾乎每個人都認識了每個團隊中至少一位同事。

all.en: Our boss often said this culture had become the company's most valuable asset.
all.zh: 老闆常說這份企業文化已成為公司最珍貴的資產。

all.en: As the next holiday season approached, we all began planning even bigger surprises.
all.zh: 當下一個假期季節接近時，我們都開始策劃更大的驚喜。

all.en: The following December's holiday party became the most anticipated event of the entire year.
all.zh: 接下來十二月的節慶派對成了全年最令人期待的活動。

all.en: Each department prepared a short performance, from poetry readings to surprise magic tricks.
all.zh: 每個部門都準備了一個小表演，從詩歌朗讀到驚喜魔術都有。

all.en: Our boss wore an even uglier sweater this year, covered in flashing battery-powered lights.
all.zh: 老闆今年穿了一件更醜的毛衣，上頭佈滿用電池點亮的閃爍燈泡。

all.en: The buffet now included dishes from every country represented on our diverse team.
all.zh: 自助餐桌上現在擺滿了我們這個多元團隊中各國同仁帶來的料理。

all.en: The intern, now in charge of office events, organized a charity gift drive for children.
all.zh: 那位實習生如今負責公司活動，籌辦了一場為兒童募集禮物的慈善活動。

all.en: Every employee donated a wrapped present, and the pile reached the ceiling of the lobby.
all.zh: 每位員工都捐了一份包裝好的禮物，禮物堆疊到大廳的天花板。

all.en: A local children's hospital sent us thank-you cards that were displayed on the main wall.
all.zh: 當地的兒童醫院寄來感謝卡，被張貼在主牆面上展示。

all.en: The accountant performed three karaoke songs and finally received her own karaoke trophy.
all.zh: 那位會計連唱了三首卡拉OK，終於拿到了專屬於她的卡拉OK獎盃。

all.en: As midnight approached, everyone gathered on the rooftop to watch the city skyline together.
all.zh: 當午夜將近，大家齊聚到屋頂上，一同觀賞城市的天際線。

all.en: I realized that the small family from years ago had grown into something truly beautiful.
all.zh: 我體會到，多年前那個小小的家庭已成長為一個真正美麗的存在。

all.en: The charity gift drive expanded into a year-round program supporting three local hospitals.
all.zh: 那次慈善禮物募集活動擴展為全年計畫，支援三家當地醫院。

all.en: Employees volunteered weekend hours to deliver presents and read stories to sick children.
all.zh: 員工們利用週末時間擔任志工，前往醫院送禮並為生病的孩子說故事。

all.en: Our boss matched every donation, doubling the impact we had on each tiny patient.
all.zh: 老闆替每一筆捐款加碼相同金額，讓我們對每位小病人的幫助加倍。

all.en: The accountant organized monthly karaoke fundraisers and raised an impressive amount of money.
all.zh: 那位會計每月籌辦卡拉OK募款活動，募得相當可觀的金額。

all.en: The intern, now a manager, mentored a fresh new intern just as he had once been welcomed.
all.zh: 那位實習生如今已是經理，正像當年自己受到的歡迎那樣，指導一位新進實習生。

all.en: The reindeer outfit was passed down each December as a symbol of our office spirit.
all.zh: 那身馴鹿裝每年十二月都會傳承下去，成為我們辦公室精神的象徵。

all.en: Photos from every gathering filled an entire hallway, telling the story of our growing family.
all.zh: 每場聚會的照片填滿了整條走廊，訴說著我們這個成長中家庭的故事。

all.en: New hires often paused in that hallway to learn the names and faces from years past.
all.zh: 新進員工常在那條走廊駐足，認識歷年來的同事姓名與面孔。

all.en: Our small company eventually won a national award for outstanding workplace culture.
all.zh: 我們這家小公司最終榮獲全國傑出職場文化獎。

all.en: At the acceptance speech, our boss simply thanked the family we had built together.
all.zh: 在領獎致詞時，老闆只是簡單感謝了我們一同建立的這個大家庭。

all.en: After the national award, our company gained attention from many young workers seeking warmer workplaces.
all.zh: 獲得全國大獎後，我們公司吸引了許多渴望更溫暖職場的年輕工作者注意。

all.en: We received thousands of applications, and our hiring team carefully welcomed dozens of new family members.
all.zh: 我們收到數千份履歷，招聘團隊用心歡迎了數十位新進的家庭成員。

all.en: The hallway of photos kept growing, soon stretching around the corner toward the second floor staircase.
all.zh: 照片廊道持續延伸，很快就繞過轉角，一路延伸到通往二樓的樓梯。

all.en: Our boss started a new tradition of writing a short personal note for every new hire on day one.
all.zh: 我們老闆開創了一個新傳統，會在新進員工報到第一天，親手寫一張短短的個人小卡。

all.en: The notes were printed on heavy paper and signed by hand, never delegated to anyone else in the office.
all.zh: 這些紙條印在厚紙上並親筆簽名，老闆從不讓辦公室任何人代勞。

all.en: On our company's twentieth anniversary, the holiday party expanded into a small cultural festival.
all.zh: 在公司二十週年慶時，年終派對擴大成了一場小型文化嘉年華。

all.en: Each team shared a song, dish, or short story from their own family or hometown traditions.
all.zh: 每個團隊都分享了一首歌、一道菜，或一段來自自己家庭或家鄉傳統的小故事。

all.en: A national newspaper covered the festival, calling it one of the most heartfelt workplace celebrations they had ever seen.
all.zh: 一家全國性報紙報導了這場嘉年華，稱它是他們見過最溫馨的職場慶祝活動之一。

all.en: Our boss invited the reporter to walk slowly through the photo hallway, sharing memories from every framed face.
all.zh: 老闆邀請記者緩緩走過照片廊道，分享每一張裱框臉孔背後的回憶。

all.en: We ended the night with a quiet group toast, knowing our small office had truly become a lasting family forever.
all.zh: 那一晚我們以一場安靜的團體乾杯作結，明白我們的小辦公室真的已成為一個永久的大家庭。

all.en: After the anniversary festival, our boss announced a sabbatical program inspired by our long-standing teamwork.
all.zh: 週年嘉年華結束後，老闆宣布了一項受長年團隊合作啟發的留職進修計畫。

all.en: Every employee with five years of service could take one paid month away to recharge or travel.
all.zh: 每位服務滿五年的員工，都能享有一個月的有薪假，用來充電或旅行。

all.en: The accountant used her sabbatical to enroll in a beginner musical theater class downtown.
all.zh: 那位會計利用她的留職進修月，到市區報名了一門初階音樂劇課程。

all.en: She returned with new confidence and surprised us by composing an original karaoke song about our office.
all.zh: 她帶著嶄新的自信回來，還出乎意料地為我們辦公室寫了一首原創卡拉OK歌曲。

all.en: The intern, now a senior manager, used his month to volunteer at an overseas literacy program for children.
all.zh: 那位實習生現已是資深經理，他利用這個月到海外為兒童識字計畫擔任志工。

all.en: He brought back colorful handmade cards from the children, which we framed beside the photo hallway.
all.zh: 他帶回了孩子們親手製作的彩色卡片，我們把它們裱框掛在照片廊道旁。

all.en: My own sabbatical took me to a quiet mountain village where I finally learned to bake bread by hand.
all.zh: 我自己的留職進修則讓我去了一座安靜的山村，終於學會了親手烘焙麵包。

all.en: I returned with fresh loaves every Friday morning, slowly turning our pantry into a warm bakery corner.
all.zh: 我回來後每週五早上都帶來新鮮的麵包，慢慢把茶水間變成一個溫馨的烘焙角落。

all.en: Our boss often said the sabbaticals had made our office even kinder, more curious, and more creative.
all.zh: 老闆常說，留職進修計畫讓我們的辦公室比以前更友善、更有好奇心，也更有創意。

all.en: On the next holiday party, we lit candles for every absent former colleague who still felt like family.
all.zh: 下一次的節慶派對上，我們為每一位依然像家人的離職同仁點上蠟燭。
